textByHash.af9bbefe5f6d3a317de39ac6961e432779d8d009: Well hello there; welcome to our little village. Pray, stay awhile.
textByHash.fb6df44cce97595f47d1dd835b6712d5f84ca57a: Well hello there; welcome to our little village. Pray, stay a while.
textByHash.25ab2bf40b6ad6cda4d373f679d220a59c62a26e: Indeed. Mayor Eustace Hobb, in fact. Do you like our home?
textByHash.32c538ebbbf2724bd863756d66169897ef8da0a8: Yes, quiet and undisturbed. Just how we like it.
textByHash.f3ebd1f19084eb563728502eafb2d5a10a718178: Tell me, what brings you to Witchaven?
textByHash.34313cd537f0316b68f218e9038f5a5ef70779a1: That's good, yes, that's good. Witchaven is a nice quiet village - very relaxing, good fishing.
textByHash.58c63ab092350db3fa2c5809494c9b20d3ac8f40: It's nothing, I'm just a little tired at the moment. So much work, so much to do.
textByHash.c1f825aef3553b99bacb956d03006937a3296e89: To the West, the shrine needs... work, yes work. Things must be made better.
textByHash.915bf4891544d8c113dd19ce91e7bf4af6464a3f: Saradomin... Why are you really here?
textByHash.20d66023a13cd8e1d88e682ad6defb90690f5def: Are you sure that's the only reason you are here?
textByHash.cad606a43871be23bbe8504e2bd739fcd0788822: Ahh, then this all makes sense. Yes, this is very good.
textByHash.07911cdbbbfe36a53fd15924f83ffdd507f1bb33: You told me when you came in.
textByHash.c8c32e4f66fde5d849dcffba8fd8448ea1349783: It does not matter. One of my... villagers, must have mentioned that you are here.
textByHash.ebf824d4071b58599aad1b5ab96c49d9f6b37c4a: Is there anything else you need to know?
textByHash.58c8f8b425c55465b9b05d9ca38a590221cc7a73: The land has seen much sorrow, much loss.
textByHash.eab5b073d67465f486609fc1e5058d441ff78786: Fishing Platform? Oh yes, that. No. The platform will do much for this place.
textByHash.311893ca0c13b12d7e378c240cad4fcf81488b0e: The platform heralds a new beginning for Witchaven, undreamed of by those who built it.
textByHash.64f008d33ba9e6b350e8564cde67a73cc8b1f91e: This is true, but it has brought us so much more in return, so much more.
textByHash.f5e340d212e8140ba808bfa772d4033975a4c070: Ahh, the shrine - the future, our destiny, our heritage.
textByHash.18d17114e3ddb1bf943b9e68d6f6618234f51e44: That which the shrine holds can unlock a new path for all the village of Witchaven. And in time the whole of Gielinor.
textByHash.d4bcb6484489ae79a5977904a5b679e6d611c541: The history of that shrine should not be overlooked. It is ancient beyond your knowledge and much that shaped our history is contained within its walls.
textByHash.0999761af3b9af8908aa148b8810f65ba2728fb9: There is much to be done before it is opened.
textByHash.f5f81f3b71031f300cf18b30833088e7ae18363a: When you are ready, it may be that you will be unable to keep yourself away.
textByHash.150adb9477a82e225a831d77985340d2deee7cfd: A touch of food poisoning perhaps.
textByHash.6699a50814016d4d6c79d55b336c768cea82c721: This has been known to turn the face and give the impression of severe illness.
textByHash.a74248ee44ef3270b52babff9ca84337ea46fa8b: Time is all that is needed. Yes, time to... get better.
textByHash.34e9c8521938a4f8043f3cf32d4d663c5e4aad71: Soon, all will be well again. Have no fear.
textByHash.46ffd314309aafbcc50e4bf4aff6d4a053f36477: Then please feel free to stay in our village a while longer. Farewell.
textByHash.53722375af40f7003cfc5600dc9c0b6644d5fddf: Ah, so good of you to finally join us . To be honest, I never thought you'd make it this far.
textByHash.9be54985c1b4690f475b9b0901fe661e6974f41f: Oh come now . Surely you are smart enough to know when you've been played for a fool?
textByHash.4665ac0e2217940cb27fae603b875204628408b2: Indeed. The enchantment placed upon this door by the Temple Knights prevented anyone not working in their interests from opening it.
textByHash.418669a729abd15402270e01628f552978d3101a: With your superb timing, our plans have been advanced quicker than even we could have anticipated.
textByHash.60f2c8e8a509a66b1c9ff2e3d6fedb0a25d425d4: You'd really like to know? Well, it seems the least I can do for you after all your hard work.
textByHash.9953a307f3725a027b7bdd7032ddfeab7d582ef3: Behold, the beauteous visage of our beloved Prince.
textByHash.beaf91d6003bc4574d732623e6d5c61c6189b88e: [laugh][laugh][laugh]... Fool. No, this is not our Great Mother, though I sincerely wish you had the chance to gaze upon her.
textByHash.1f1eba68cfbf900e07215b0e4fbcc2d258c87832: Sadly for you, this will be the last thing you ever see.
textByHash.62987521ba5eabafd060af22dbb3bba58078b8a4: No! Do you realise what you have done?
textByHash.4802472ba0232ec19962d9ccc39742876fc3c37a: You fool! Did you think it would be so easy? The Prince will be reborn in all his glory!
textByHash.1ac7108671bf9314c26b9f0727314269a8d9dd78: Now you face the true wrath of the Mother Mallum!
